parameter.name: valveId
parameter.label: Valve ID
parameter.description: Rachio Smart Hose Timer Valve UUID. Required for manually created Valve Things.

parameter.name: baseStationId
parameter.label: Base Station ID
parameter.description: Parent Smart Hose Timer Base Station UUID.

channel-type.label: Name
channel-type.description: Smart Hose Timer valve name.

channel-type.label: Online
channel-type.description: ON when Rachio reports that the valve is online or connected.

channel-type.label: Run Valve
channel-type.description: ON starts the valve. OFF stops the valve.

channel-type.label: Runtime
channel-type.description: Runtime in seconds for the next manual valve start.

channel-type.label: Default Runtime
channel-type.description: Valve default manual runtime in seconds. Commands update the Rachio cloud setting.

channel-type.label: State Matches
channel-type.description: ON when the physical valve has synchronized with the desired cloud-side state.

channel-type.label: Flow Detected
channel-type.description: ON when flow is detected for the valve run, if reported by Rachio.

channel-type.label: Battery Level
channel-type.description: Valve battery level when reported by Rachio.

channel-type.label: Serial Number
channel-type.description: Valve serial number when reported by Rachio.

channel-type.label: Last Run Type
channel-type.description: Run type from the most recent valve webhook event.

channel-type.label: Last End Reason
channel-type.description: End reason from the most recent valve stop webhook event.

channel-type.label: Next Planned Runtime
channel-type.description: Start time of the next planned valve run from Summary day views.

channel-type.label: Next Planned Run Duration
channel-type.description: Duration of the next planned valve run in seconds.

channel-type.label: Next Planned Run Program ID
channel-type.description: Program ID associated with the next planned valve run.

channel-type.label: Next Planned Run Skipped
channel-type.description: ON when the next planned valve run is currently skipped.

channel-type.label: Last Completed Runtime
channel-type.description: Start time of the most recent completed valve run from Summary day views.

channel-type.label: Last Completed Run Duration
channel-type.description: Duration of the most recent completed valve run in seconds.

channel-type.label: Last Run Status
channel-type.description: Status of the most recent completed valve run from Summary day views.

channel-type.label: Skip Next Planned Run
channel-type.description: ON skips the next upcoming valve planned run when Summary day-view identifiers are available.

channel-type.label: Cancel Next Planned Run Skip
channel-type.description: ON cancels the next skipped upcoming valve run when Summary day-view identifiers are available.
